products.title: Coldwater Slim Straight Jeans
products.body_html: A perfectly lived-in pair of slim straight jeans. Designed to visually elongate the legs, these jeans are meticulously tailored for the perfect slim, not too tight or too skinny silhouette. Blue washes are lightly distressed, faded, and whiskered by hand for a naturally worn-in look.

products.title: Hollyridge Relaxed Bootcut Jeans
products.body_html: A classic pair of bootcut jeans from the 90s. Updated to pinch at the waist and pool over the shoe, these jeans are tailored for a relaxed, lived-in feel. Constructed in a rigid, non-stretch denim, these go-to jeans only get better with age.

products.title: Canon Loose Straight-Leg Jeans
products.body_html: A pair of loose straight-leg jeans inspired by 90s youth. Designed to be relaxed and slouchy around the leg without looking overly baggy. Canon is a go-with-everything pair of forever denim.

products.title: Reservoir Textural Tie
products.body_html: A textural update to a suiting staple. Reservoir is constructed in a faux suede for a western statement to traditional tailoring.

products.title: Paramount Oversized Blazer
products.body_html:
A structural single-breasted blazer tailored for an effortless, boyish fit. This menswear classic is precisely cut for a roomier width, shoulder, and length without looking overly baggy. Paramount is sharp yet casual and designed for in and out of office wear.

Wear Paramount as an everyday transitional layer over jeans, or pair it with the matching trousers for more formal red-carpet occasions.

products.title: Palos Oversized Crew-Neck Sweater
products.body_html: Tailored for an oversized, relaxed fit with dropped shoulders, exaggerated ribbed edges and extra long sleeves. Made with cash-wool™, a cozy 100% heavyweight wool woven to mimic the natural softness of cashmere. A reimagined wardrobe staple that combines considered proportions with luxurious craftsmanship.

products.title: Pacific Oversized Collared Sweatshirt
products.body_html: A collared long-sleeve sweatshirt constructed in a mid-weight French Terry cotton for a sporty, collegiate feel. Ultra-relaxed with dropped shoulders and room in the body. Pair with the Dume ultra-pleated trousers to pair down tailored looks for the ultimate casual cool.

products.title: Norton Vintage-Fit Turtleneck
products.body_html: A utilitarian classic updated with modern minimalism. The Norton Turtleneck is precisely tailored with a relaxed body and fitted sleeves to achieve an effortless, loose elegance. Constructed in an ultra-fine merino wool, it's breathability and drape allows for it to be layered or worn as a statement alone. More and less in practice.

products.title: Nicholas Shrunken Hoodie
products.body_html:
Inspired by the 90s, the Nicholas shrunken hoodie is cropped at the belt line and shrunken for a snug fit. Constructed from a super soft fleece-backed cotton, Nicholas is effortlessly casual and ultra-comfortable. Pair with pleated trousers to dress down tailored looks for the ultimate casual cool.

Sunfaded washes are made to replicate a lived-in, in-the-sun look and feel. Each fade is unique with a worn-down texture that only gets better with age.

products.title: Neutra Oversized Structural Coat
products.body_html: A pared-down sartorial classic with an irreverent twist. This statement structural coat is tailored to perfection with sharp, broad shoulders and clean lines. Constructed in a supremely soft & fluid 100% lightweight wool that drapes below the knee, this layer offers a dose of sophistication to transitional dressing.

products.title: Moreno Pleated Bermuda Shorts
products.body_html: A pair of pleated, long bermuda shorts constructed in a fluid tencel textile. Beautifully draped and precisely tailored, Moreno works double time for day and evening wear all summer long.

products.title: Monterey Wool Car Coat
products.body_html: Inspired by vintage car coats designed for convenience and driving. Monterey updates the traditional silhouette with a relaxed cut and a leather-belted collar closure. Constructed in ultra soft, 100% wool, Monterey can be layered for versatility through the transitional season.

products.title: Mills Stonewashed Workwear Shirt
products.body_html: A classic French chore jacket updated with a modern crop and a lived-in rinse. Simple and practical with a traditional 3-pocket silhouette. A boyish lightweight layer for everyday wear.

products.title: Matador Tailored Trousers
products.body_html: Single-pleated trousers with a sharp, tailored straight-leg. Matador combines fluid pleats with a precisely tailored leg for a classic pair of wool trousers. The ultimate capsule wardrobe staple, designed to be worn casually or as a set with the matching blazer.

products.title: Marmont Double-Breasted Blazer
products.body_html:
A double-breasted blazer with an effortlessly boyish fit. Marmont is precisely cut for a roomier waist and a slightly broader shoulder without looking overly baggy. A formal menswear classic with a relaxed, boyish twist.

Wear Marmont as an everyday layer over jeans, or pair it with the matching trousers for more formal red-carpet occasions.

products.title: Manhattan Oversized Overcoat
products.body_html: Traditional Wall Street meets West Coast casual. Blending precise tailoring with a minimalist, relaxed silhouette, this statement coat features broad shoulders, a double-breasted front closure, and notch lapels. Named after Manhattan Beach in the South Bay, Manhattan can be worn over tailoring or casually over sweatpants.

products.title: Maltman Slim Short Sleeve Silk Henley
products.body_html: A 90s minimalist short-sleeve Henley precisely tailored for a slim & sleek fit. With an ultra-low front placket and belt-line crop, Maltman is our modern take on a classic menswear silhouette. Constructed in a liquid smooth, ribbed silk spandex for a body-hugging stretch.

products.title: Lyndon Oversized Watchcoat
products.body_html: Inspired by vintage watchcoats traditionally designed for guards on duty, Lyndon is a statement military greatcoat with an oversized construction. Featuring a removable belt, double-breasted closure and dense wool exterior. Lyndon can be buttoned up to the top or worn open to elevate more casual looks.

products.title: Linden Slim Leather Gloves
products.body_html: Slick, slim, wrist-length gloves in an unexpected tone. Constructed in a buttery smooth, crinkle lambskin leather, Linden is a rare cold weather accessory that is both editorial and practical.

products.title: Laurel Relaxed Wide-Leg Jeans
products.body_html: A baggy pair of wide-leg jeans. Made with a length that pools at the bottom, these jeans are tailored for a super baggy fit while maintaining an elegant, elongated leg. Slouchy and relaxed yet polished, these go-to jeans only get better with wear.

products.title: Lakeview Long Sleeve Merino Polo
products.body_html: A timeless staple of 90s minimalism. Lakeview combines the luxury of merino wool with an oversized, long-sleeve polo silhouette. Constructed in a soft, extra fine, summer-weight wool for an effortless and easy-going drape.

products.title: Kinney Ultra-Relaxed Sweatpant
products.body_html:
A relaxed sweatpant with generous proportions from thigh to leg opening. Constructed from a super soft fleece-backed cotton, Kinney is slouchy, effortlessly casual, and ultra-comfortable. We prefer to contrast Kinney against leather or formalwear.

Sunfaded washes are made to replicate a lived-in, in-the-sun look and feel. Each fade is unique with a worn-down texture that only gets better with age.

products.title: Julian Oversized Trench Coat
products.body_html: Inspired by the vintage, worn-in trench coats at the Melrose Trading Post. The Julian trench features exaggerated, oversized proportions constructed in a tumbled, broken-in cotton twill. Unlike traditional trench coats, Julian has a lived-in, ultra-relaxed feel for casual, everyday wear.

products.title: Hyperion Leather Flight Jacket
products.body_html: An investment leather bomber inspired by the A1 US Air Force jackets from the 40's. Constructed in a smooth 100% aged leather with brushed silver hardware for a lived-in feel. A masculine statement jacket that will endure season after season.

products.title: Hoover Textural Slim Zip Cardigan
products.body_html: Inspired by the textural knitwear of the 80s, this zip cardigan is constructed in an ultra-fuzzy loop-knit wool blend for an old-school feel. Hoover features side hand pockets, a double zip closure, and a slim and snug silhouette.

products.title: Highland Square Buckle Western Belt
products.body_html: A slim leather belt with sharp western-inspired silver hardware. Adorned with a brushed silver square buckle, solid silver belt loop, and a pointed silver tip. A minimalist edge for the California cowboy.

products.title: Hauser 90s Fit Crewneck Sweater
products.body_html:
A timeless staple inspired by 90s minimalism. Hauser reimagines the merino crewneck sweater with a shorter length, relaxed body, and loose ribbing at the cuffs and hem. The slightly shorter, slightly looser details make this everyday basic more casual, effortless, and elevated.

Pair with the Eames T-Shirt peeking out from the collar and hem for an effortless, everyday casual look.

products.title: Hartford Soft Wool Blouson
products.body_html: A vintage-inspired, boyish wool blouson. A wardrobe classic updated with a slim cut, slight crop to the belt line and taper into the waist. Constructed in a 100% wool exterior, Hartford is a softer iteration of our best-selling Fairfax Blouson.

products.title: Hancock Mini Merino Polo
products.body_html: Hancock updates a classic polo silhouette with a slim fit, slight crop with room around the waist, and bicep-exposing short sleeves. A classic wardrobe staple with a boyish twist.

products.title: Hammer 90s Fit V-Neck Sweater
products.body_html:
A timeless staple inspired by 90s minimalism. Hammer reimagines the merino v-neck sweater with a shorter length, relaxed body and loose ribbing at the cuffs and hem. The slightly shorter, slightly looser details make this everyday basic more casual, effortless and elevated.

Pair with the Eames T-Shirt peeking out from the collar and hem for an effortless, everyday casual look.
